action.name: Find in this folder
action.description: Search for files within this folder

action.name: Media: Concatenate files
action.submenu: Scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools/Media: Concatenate files" %F

action.name: Media: Remove metadata
action.submenu: Scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools/Media: Remove metadata" %F

action.name: Media: Show basic metadata
action.submenu: Scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio and Video: Tools/Media: Show basic metadata" %F

action.name: Audio: Mix channels to mono
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio: Channels/Audio: Mix channels to mono" %F

action.name: Audio: Mix two files
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio: Channels/Audio: Mix two files" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio: Convert/Audio: Convert to FLAC" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Audio and Video/Audio: Convert/Audio: Convert to MP3 (320 kbps)" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Image/Image: SVG files/SVG: Export to PNG (1024 px)" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Image/Image: SVG files/SVG: Export to PNG (256 px)" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Image/Image: SVG files/SVG: Export to PNG (512 px)" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Image/Image: Transparency/Image: Color magenta to alpha" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Image/Image: Transparency/Image: Color white to alpha" %F

action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Image/Image: Transparency/Image: Color white to alpha (15 pct)" %F

action.name: Git: Open repository website
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Network and Internet/Git: Open repository website" %F

action.name: Git: Reset and pull
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Network and Internet/Git: Reset and pull" %F

action.name: URL: Check HTTP status
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Network and Internet/URL: Check HTTP status" %F

action.name: URL: Show HTTP headers
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Network and Internet/URL: Show HTTP headers" %F

action.name: Text: Convert tabs to 4 spaces
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Plain text/Text: Convert tabs to 4 spaces" %F

action.name: Rename: Change dashes to spaces
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Rename files/Rename: Change dashes to spaces" %F

action.name: Rename: Change spaces to dashes
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Rename files/Rename: Change spaces to dashes" %F

action.name: Scan for malware (via ClamAV)
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Security and Recovery/Scan for malware (via ClamAV)" %F

action.name: Scan for malware (via Lenspect)
action.command: bash "/home/debola/.local/share/scripts/Security and Recovery/Scan for malware (via Lenspect)" %F

action.name: Install Deb Package
action.command: x-terminal-emulator -e bash -c "sudo apt install %F; echo;read -n 1 -s -r -p 'Press any key to close.'"
action.description: Uses terminal and apt to install the deb package.

action.name: flatten folder
action.description: Moves all files from sub-folders to parent (current) folder, then removes all empty folders inside the current folder

action.name: compress png 2
action.command: for file in %F; do advpng -z -4 -q "$file"; done

action.name: Optimize with jpegoptim
action.command: for file in %F; do jpegoptim --strip-all -of "$file"; done
action.description: Losslessly optimize JPEGs, by optimizing the Huffman tables and stripping comments and EXIF metadata from the file.

action.name: Media meta ffmpeg
action.command: ffmpeg -i %f 2>&1 | grep -e Stream -e Duration -e Input | zenity --width=800 --height=240 --text-info --title %n
action.description: Grabs info from a media (audio/video) file using ffmpeg.

action.name: strip spaces from filenames make lowercase
change multiple file permissions
action.command:
ans=$(zenity --height=350 --list --text "change files permissions" --checklist --column "pick" --column "options" TRUE "user-read" TRUE "user-write" FALSE "user-exec" FALSE "group-read" FALSE "group-write" FALSE "group-exec" FALSE "all-read" FALSE "all-write" FALSE "all-exec" --separator=":"); if [ "$ans" != "" ]; then searchuserread="user-read"; searchuserwrite="user-write"; searchuserexec="user-exec"; user1="0" ; user2="0" ; user3="0" ; searchgroupread="group-read"; searchgroupwrite="group-write"; searchgroupexec="group-exec"; group1="0" ; group2="0" ; group3="0" ; searchallread="all-read"; searchallwrite="all-write"; searchallexec="all-exec"; all1="0" ; all2="0" ; all3="0" ; case $ans in *"$searchuserread"*) user1="4" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchuserwrite"*) user2="2" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchuserexec"*) user3="1" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchgroupread"*) group1="4" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchgroupwrite"*) group2="2" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchgroupexec"*) group3="1" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchallread"*) all1="4" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchallwrite"*) all2="2" ;; esac ; case $ans in *"$searchallexec"*) all3="1" ;; esac ; u=$(($user1 + $user2 + $user3)) ; g=$(($group1 + $group2 + $group3)) ; a=$(($all1 + $all2 + $all3)) ; result="$u$g$a" ; chmod $result %F || { zenity --error --text="an error occurred!
check if you are allowed
to change permissions
of the selected files"; } ; fi

action.name: Encrypt symmetrically with GPG
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; if ! /bin/gpg-agent;then (echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Initialising gnupg...'); /bin/gpg2 --list-public-keys; /bin/gpg-connect-agent /bye; /bin/gpg-agent --pinentry-program="/bin/pinentry-gtk-2" pulse)|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close;fi; PASSWORD=$(/bin/zenity --password) || exit; (AMOUNT=$(for file in %F;do echo "$file";done | wc -l);NR=0;for file in %F;do NR="$(echo "$NR+1" | /bin/bc)"; PERCENTAGE="$(echo "$NR*100/$AMOUNT" | /bin/bc)"; filebase=$(basename "$file"); echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Encrypting') ... "$filebase"; (fileinput="$(echo "$file")";filefinalout="$(echo "$file".asc)";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (echo $PASSWORD | /bin/gpg2 --batch --yes --passphrase-fd 0 --symmetric --armor -o "$fileout" "$fileinput");fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi ); echo $PERCENTAGE;done )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close )
action.description: Each selected file is encrypted symmetrically with one given password with GPG.

action.name: Encrypt asymmetrically with GPG
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; if ! /bin/gpg-agent;then (echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Initialising gnupg...'); /bin/gpg2 --list-public-keys; /bin/gpg-connect-agent /bye; /bin/gpg-agent --pinentry-program="/bin/pinentry-gtk-2" pulse)|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close;fi; if test -z "$(/bin/gpg2 --list-public-keys | /home/debola/.local/bin/parse-gpg2-k)";then /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'Your local keyring does not contain any public keys.'))"; exit; fi; RECIPIENT_KEY="$(/bin/gpg2 --list-public-keys | /home/debola/.local/bin/parse-gpg2-k | /bin/zenity --list --print-column=1 --column="$(eval_gettext 'Public Key')" --column="$(eval_gettext 'Name')" --column="$(eval_gettext 'Email')" --text="$(eval_gettext 'Select a recipient key from the list below.')" --title="$(eval_gettext 'Recipient key')" )"; /bin/gpg-connect-agent /bye; /bin/gpg-agent --pinentry-program="/bin/pinentry-gtk-2"; (AMOUNT=$(for file in %F;do echo "$file";done | wc -l);NR=0;for file in %F;do NR="$(echo "$NR+1" | /bin/bc)"; PERCENTAGE="$(echo "$NR*100/$AMOUNT" | /bin/bc)"; filebase=$(basename "$file"); echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Encrypting') ... "$filebase"; (fileinput="$(echo "$file")";filefinalout="$(echo "$file".gpg)";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (/bin/gpg2 --batch --yes --recipient "$RECIPIENT_KEY" --encrypt --armor --trust-model always --output "$fileout" "$fileinput");fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi ); echo $PERCENTAGE;done )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close )
action.description: Each selected file is encrypted asymmetrically with GPG.

action.name: Decrypt with GPG
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; if ! /bin/gpg-agent;then (echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Initialising gnupg...'); /bin/gpg2 --list-public-keys; /bin/gpg-connect-agent /bye; /bin/gpg-agent --pinentry-program="/bin/pinentry-gtk-2" pulse)|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close;fi; (AMOUNT=$(for file in %F;do echo "$file";done | wc -l);NR=0;for file in %F;do NR="$(echo "$NR+1" | /bin/bc)"; PERCENTAGE="$(echo "$NR*100/$AMOUNT" | /bin/bc)"; filebase=$(basename "$file"); echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Decrypting') ... "$filebase"; (fileinput="$(echo "$file")";filefinalout="$(echo $(dirname "$file")/$(basename "$file" | /bin/perl -pe 's#\.\w+$##g'))";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (/bin/gpg2 --batch --yes --decrypt -o "$fileout" "$fileinput" || /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'Could not decrypt $filebase.') $(eval_gettext 'Wrong password or no appropriate private key available?'))"; );fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi ); echo $PERCENTAGE;done )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close )
action.description: Each selected file is decrypted with GPG.

action.name: Turn clockwise
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; (AMOUNT=$(for file in %F;do echo "$file";done | wc -l);NR=0;for file in %F;do NR="$(echo "$NR+1" | /bin/bc)"; PERCENTAGE="$(echo "$NR*100/$AMOUNT" | /bin/bc)"; filebase=$(basename "$file"); echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Rotating clockwise') ... "$filebase"; (fileinput="$(echo "$file")";filefinalout="$(echo "$file")";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (/bin/convert -rotate 90 "$fileinput" "$fileout");fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi ); echo $PERCENTAGE;done )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close )
action.description: The selected images are turned clockwise.

action.name: Turn anti-clockwise
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; (AMOUNT=$(for file in %F;do echo "$file";done | wc -l);NR=0;for file in %F;do NR="$(echo "$NR+1" | /bin/bc)"; PERCENTAGE="$(echo "$NR*100/$AMOUNT" | /bin/bc)"; filebase=$(basename "$file"); echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Rotating anti-clockwise') ... "$filebase"; (fileinput="$(echo "$file")";filefinalout="$(echo "$file")";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (/bin/convert -rotate 270 "$fileinput" "$fileout");fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi ); echo $PERCENTAGE;done )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close )
action.description: The selected images are turned anti-clockwise.

action.name: Convert to other format
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; FORMAT=$( /bin/convert -list format | /bin/perl -ane '($f,$m,$c,$d)=m/^\s*(\S*?)\**\s*(\S*)\s*([r-][w-][+-])\s*(.*)$/g;if($c=~m/^.w.$/){print join "\n",$f,$d,""}' | /bin/zenity --list --print-column=1 --column="$(eval_gettext 'Format')" --column="$(eval_gettext 'Description')" --text="$(eval_gettext 'Select format:')" --title="$(eval_gettext 'Format')" ); if test $? -ne 0;then exit; fi; FORMAT=$(echo $FORMAT | /bin/perl -ne 'print lc'); if test -z "$FORMAT";then /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'No format selected.') $(eval_gettext 'If you see this message, please contact the developer on https://github.com/nobodyinperson/thunar-custom-actions.'))"; exit 1; fi; (AMOUNT=$(for file in %F;do echo "$file";done | wc -l);NR=0;for file in %F;do NR="$(echo "$NR+1" | /bin/bc)"; PERCENTAGE="$(echo "$NR*100/$AMOUNT" | /bin/bc)"; filebase=$(basename "$file"); echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Converting to $FORMAT') ... "$filebase"; (fileinput="$(echo "$file")";filefinalout="$(echo $(dirname "$file")/$(basename "$file" | /bin/perl -pe 's#\.\w+$##g').${FORMAT})";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (CONVERT_OUTPUT=$(/bin/convert "$fileinput" "$fileout" 2>&1;) || /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'Could not convert $fileinput to $FORMAT: $CONVERT_OUTPUT'))"; );fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi ); echo $PERCENTAGE;done )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close )
action.description: The selected images are converted to a specified format.

action.name: Fill transparency
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; COLOR=$(/bin/zenity --color-selection) || exit; (AMOUNT=$(for file in %F;do echo "$file";done | wc -l);NR=0;for file in %F;do NR="$(echo "$NR+1" | /bin/bc)"; PERCENTAGE="$(echo "$NR*100/$AMOUNT" | /bin/bc)"; filebase=$(basename "$file"); echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Filling transparency with $COLOR') ... "$filebase"; (fileinput="$(echo "$file")";filefinalout="$(echo "$file")";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (/bin/convert "$fileinput" -background "$COLOR" -alpha remove "$fileout");fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi ); echo $PERCENTAGE;done )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close )
action.description: The alpha channel in the selected images is filled with the selected color.

action.name: Find space-consuming elements
action.command:
(set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; TMPFILE=$(mktemp); (echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Determining file sizes')...; du -ha --max-depth 1 %f | sort -rh | perl -ne '($s,$n)=m/^(\S+)\s+(\S+.*)$/;$n=~s:.*/([^/]+)$:${1}:g;print "$s
$n
"' | tee $TMPFILE)|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close --title="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'Determining file sizes'))" --pulsate; cd %f; cat $TMPFILE | /bin/zenity --list --column="$(eval_gettext 'Size')" --column="$(eval_gettext 'Name')" --title="$(eval_gettext 'Big elements')" --text="$(eval_gettext 'Elements sorted by size')
$(eval_gettext 'Double-click to open.')" --print-column 2 | /bin/xargs -r --delimiter='
' /bin/xdg-open; rm "$TMPFILE")
action.description: Give a sorted list of the biggest files and folders here.

action.name: Convert to a single PDF
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; ORIENTATION="$( ( echo $(eval_gettext 'Portrait'); echo $(eval_gettext 'Landscape'); ) | /bin/zenity --list --column="$(eval_gettext 'Orientation')" --text="$(eval_gettext 'Choose an orientation for the PDF.')" --title="$(eval_gettext 'PDF orientation')")"; if test $? -ne 0;then exit; fi; A4_PORTRAIT_WIDTH=1654; A4_PORTRAIT_HEIGHT=2338; if test "$ORIENTATION" = "$(eval_gettext 'Portrait')";then WIDTH=$A4_PORTRAIT_WIDTH; HEIGHT=$A4_PORTRAIT_HEIGHT; elif test "$ORIENTATION" = "$(eval_gettext 'Landscape')";then WIDTH=$A4_PORTRAIT_HEIGHT; HEIGHT=$A4_PORTRAIT_WIDTH; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'Strange orientation $ORIENTATION selected.') $(eval_gettext 'If you see this message, please contact the developer on https://github.com/nobodyinperson/thunar-custom-actions.'))"; exit 1; fi; (echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Converting to PDF')...; fileinput="$(echo %F)";filefinalout="$(echo $(dirname %f)/$(basename %f | /bin/perl -pe 's#\.\w+$##g')_$ORIENTATION.pdf)";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (/bin/convert %F -gravity Center -background white -resize ${WIDTH}x${HEIGHT} -extent ${WIDTH}x${HEIGHT} -units PixelsPerInch -density 200x200 "$fileout");fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close --title="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'Converting to PDF'))" --pulsate )
action.description: The selected images are converted to pages of a single PDF document at A4 page size.

action.name: Concatenate PDFs
action.command: (set -e;export TEXTDOMAIN='thunar-custom-actions';export TEXTDOMAINDIR='/home/debola/.local/share/locale';. /bin/gettext.sh; (echo '#'$(eval_gettext 'Concatenating PDFs')...; fileinput="$(echo %F)";filefinalout="$(echo %f-all.pdf)";if test "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then fileout=$(f=$(echo "$filefinalout");while test -e "$f";do f=$(dirname "$f")/.$(basename "$f").tmp;done;echo "$f");else fileout="$filefinalout";fi;OVERWRITE=yes;if test -e "$filefinalout" -a ! "$fileinput" = "$filefinalout";then base=$(basename "$filefinalout"); if ! (/bin/zenity --question --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'overwrite $base?'))");then OVERWRITE=no; fi;fi;if test "$OVERWRITE" = "yes";then (/bin/gs -dBATCH -dNOPAUSE -q -sDEVICE=pdfwrite -sOutputFile="$fileout" %F);fi;if ! test "$fileout" = "$filefinalout";then if cp "$fileout" "$filefinalout";then rm "$fileout"; else /bin/zenity --error --text="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'something went wrong copying the file $fileout over to $filefinalout.'))"; fi;fi )|/bin/zenity --progress --auto-kill --auto-close --title="$(echo $(eval_gettext 'Concatenating PDFs'))" --pulsate )
action.description: The selected PDF files are concatenated into one PDF file.
